summary: Iteration 5 testing: Filtered CSV Export (client-side) and RBAC on User Management. All 13 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass. Both features fully working.

features_verified.export_csv_button_label_no_filter: ✅ Shows 'Export CSV' when no filters active
features_verified.export_csv_button_label_with_search: ✅ Shows 'Export CSV (1)' when search filter active
features_verified.export_csv_button_label_with_status: ✅ Shows 'Export CSV (N)' when status filter active
features_verified.export_csv_button_label_cleared: ✅ Reverts to 'Export CSV' when all filters cleared
features_verified.export_csv_aria_label_no_filter: ✅ aria-label='Export all inventory records to a CSV file' when no filter
features_verified.export_csv_aria_label_with_filter: ✅ aria-label='Export N filtered records to CSV' when filter active
features_verified.export_csv_client_side: ✅ No /api/export/csv network call made - confirmed client-side Blob download
features_verified.export_csv_success_toast: ✅ 'Exported 1 record' success toast shown after export
features_verified.export_csv_empty_filter_toast: ✅ 'No records to export. Adjust your filters to include some records.' error toast shown
features_verified.export_csv_with_search_filter: ✅ Only matching records exported (confirmed via filtered array driving export)
features_verified.export_csv_date_filter_excludes_null_dat: ✅ iter4 bug fix confirmed: records with no date_imaged excluded from date range filter
features_verified.sidebar_user_management_admin: ✅ 'User Management' nav link (data-testid=nav-user-management) visible for admin
features_verified.sidebar_user_management_technician: ✅ 'User Management' nav link NOT in DOM for technician (NAV_ITEMS conditional confirmed)
features_verified.technician_access_denied_screen: ✅ Access-denied screen (data-testid=access-denied-screen) shown when tech navigates to /users
features_verified.access_denied_auto_redirect: ✅ Redirect from /users to / happens at ~3s (well within 4s requirement)
features_verified.backend_csv_endpoint_still_works: ✅ Backend /api/export/csv still returns 200 with correct CSV

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: AdminRoute countdown starts at 3, showing '3 seconds' initially. The requirement says 'within 4 seconds'. Code is correct, but if requirement wants exactly 3s visible, consider starting at 4s. Low priority.
Export CSV button shows 'Export CSV (0)' when date/status filter is active with 0 matching records - this is by design since a filter IS active. Clicking it correctly shows the error toast. No bug.
test_credentials: Admin: admin/Admin@12345. Tech: testtech_final/Tech@12345 (created for this test, not deleted - can be used in future iterations).
seed_data_creation: Created testtech_final (role=technician, password=Tech@12345) for RBAC testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified: (1) Client-side CSV export uses filtered array, no API call, shows correct button labels, correct toasts. (2) RBAC: technician has no User Management sidebar link, gets access-denied screen with role=alert + aria-live=assertive when navigating to /users, auto-redirects to / in ~3s. Backend 403 on all /api/admin/users endpoints for technicians. iter4 date filter bug (null date_imaged) confirmed fixed. Admin: admin/Admin@12345. Tech: testtech_final/Tech@12345.
